For example, if the base service's image URL is `docker.io/library/nginx:latest`, then valid values are: `docker.io/library/nginx:<any tag or SHA>`, `library/nginx:<any tag or SHA>`, or `nginx:<any tag or SHA>`. Note that the path must match (only the tag or SHA can vary).
